SETTINGS
STARTUP
THEME
BACKGROUND

Picture uses a photo from photos/background/ instead of the themed gradient. Add images to BACKGROUND_IMAGES in config.js.

TIME OF DAY THEME

Automatically switch the accent colour at set times of day. Leave a slot as Default to keep the current theme.

BLOOM INTENSITY
FONTS
LANGUAGE
TOP-LEFT ELEMENTS
Dashboard Name
Custom Name
Clock
Clock Format
Toggle on for 12-hour (AM/PM), off for 24-hour
